And with both the tentacle and the grinding pad lined with oversized suckers, you'll get both internal and external stimulation on your clitoris or perineum for that dual-stimulation you know you crave. Just make sure you're using plenty of water-based lube, and hit that remote to unleash 10 deep, rumbling vibration modes, ranging from steady speeds to pulsing patterns. Or hand over the remote to your partner and let them enjoy the show.

And yes, the Kraken is fully waterproof so you can take it into the shower, or bath, for fully submerged play and really live out your fantasy of being taken by a monster from the deep!

Dare you sail the high seas?

name: nsnovelties Colours Pleasures 7" Vibrating Dildo
description:

The vibrating Colours Pleasures range of dildos from NS Novelties is the erection that never quits! These vibrant, smooth yet firm dildos feature a suction cup base for hands-free fun and can be mounted on a dry, flat surface or a compatible harness.

Explore 3 powerful speeds of vibration and 7 patterns and let the fun begin!  For best results, apply a generous amount of  water-based lube before use. Once you're done wash in warm, soapy water and sanitise with antibacterial toy cleaner. Allow to dry fully before storage.
